title: Llama 3 technical report
goal: Find the Llama 3 technical report and report model sizes, training data scale, and benchmark scores for MMLU.
constraints: Source: arXiv or Meta AI site
rubric: Reports Llama 3 model sizes (8B/70B/405B), training tokens, and MMLU score.
final_answer: Dubey, A. et al. (2024). 'The Llama 3 Herd of Models.' arXiv:2407.21783. Released 8B and 70B chat models trained on 15.6T tokens, plus the larger 405B. Llama 3 70B scores 86.0 on MMLU (5-shot) per the report.
